def eligible_for_job_rehabilitation(self) -> bool:
        gender_options = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        race_options = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        employment_status_options = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        education_options = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        marital_status_options = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        religion_options = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']

        if (self.gender in gender_options and
            self.race in race_options and
            self.employment_status in employment_status_options and
            self.education in education_options and
            self.marital_status in marital_status_options and
            self.religion in religion_options and
            self.disability_percentage in [30, 70] and
            self.years_unemployed in range(1, 6)):
            return True
        else:
            return False
